posts.title: Building the Ultimate DIY NAS: ZimaBoard 2 Review & Benchmarks
posts.author: Amrut Prabhu
posts.summary: Build the ultimate compact DIY NAS with ZimaBoard 2. Leveraging ZimaOS and dual 2.5GbE, this energy-efficient kit simplifies backups, media streaming, and running virtual machines for your personal home lab

suggestedArticles.title: Radxa Cubie A7A Review: Pi-Sized Power With PCIe, NVMe, USB 3.1 Gen2
Radxa Dragon Q6A: Benchmarks, thermals, and Windows 11 Pro on ARM

CPU.Cores:
4 × Intel N150 Cores
Frequency up to 3.60GHz
6M Cache

specifications.AI Capabilities:
CPU Only.
Expandable via PCIe (e.g., external GPU support)
specifications.Storage:
Onboard 32GB / 64GB eMMC
2 × SATA 3.0 6Gb/s Ports (with power)
Expandable via PCIe 3.0 slot
specifications.Operating System:
[ZimaOS](https://www.zimaspace.com/zimaos) (Pre-installed)
Supports CasaOS, Debian, Ubuntu, Windows, OpenWrt, pfSense

posts.title: Radxa Cubie A7Z: Raspberry Pi Zero–sized Powerful SBC
posts.author: Amrut Prabhu
posts.summary: Radxa Cubie A7Z review with benchmarks, NVMe over PCIe Gen3 x1, USB 3.1 Gen2 speeds, thermals, power draw, and real-world 1080p/4K playback tests.

I Built A DIY 10 Inch Server Rack

CPU.Cores:
2 × Cortex-A76 up to 2.0GHz
6 × Cortex-A55 up to 1.8GHz

specifications.Storage:
MicroSD
Onboard UFS module (optional, up to 1TB)
NVMe SSD (via PCIe FPC + external HAT)
specifications.Video Output:
1 × Micro HDMI 2.0 up to 4K@60fps
1 × USB-C (DP Alt Mode) for external displays
specifications.USB:
1 × USB-C 2.0 OTG (Power + Data)
1 × USB-C (USB 3.1) with DisplayPort Alt Mode
specifications.Power:
5V via USB-C power port
5V via GPIO pins 2 & 4

posts.title: Muse Pi Pro (Spacemit K1 / M1) – My First Real RISC-V Experience
posts.author: Amrut Prabhu
posts.summary: Hands-on review of the Muse Pi Pro RISC-V SBC with the SpacemiT K1 SoC – benchmarks, thermals, NVMe and Wi-Fi 6 performance, plus my honest thoughts for developers.

specifications.SoC: SpacemiT M1 RISC-V SoC (similar to K1)
specifications.Video Output:
1 x HDMI 1.4 up to 1080p @ 60 Hz
1 x 2-lane MIPI DSI via 15-pin FPC, up to 1080p60
specifications.USB:
4 × USB-A 3.0
1 × USB-C 2.0 with OTG (also used for power/PD)
specifications.Power: 5 V / 9 V / 12 V up to 3 A via USB-C PD Input
specifications.Camera:
1 x 4-lane MIPI CSI via 22-pin FPC
1 x 2-lane MIPI CSI via 15-pin FPC
specifications.Other Expansion Capabilities:
RTC battery connector
Full-size miniPCIe slot (PCIe Gen 2 x1 lane)
